hypothesis: PHIL-10 claim that learning compounds through persistent artifacts. Prior test (S523, L-1477) found horizon-bounded at ~50 sessions.
method: Citation graph analysis across 8 era windows (L-1..1599), measuring participation rate, refs/lesson density, backward reach distance, and distance distribution
verdict: PHIL-10 REFINED not DROPPED. Compounding real for integration depth (accelerating reach). Integration density peaked and declining — maturation pattern. Prior L-1477 horizon-bound finding WRONG: reach is deepening, not capping.
ideal_man_trait: T3 (truth) — this test was selected by the ideal man selection function as highest-leverage falsification work
